caption: The video features a presentation titled "The DARPA OPS-5G Program: A Collaboration between Government and the Open Source Community," delivered by Michael August from the United States Department of the Navy on April 12th, 2022. The presentation is part of the Open Networking & Edge Executive Forum, hosted by The Linux Foundation, LF Networking, and LF Edge. The slide displayed has a dark background with a network diagram motif, emphasizing the theme of connectivity and collaboration. In the top right corner, there is a small inset showing the presenter, who appears to be speaking or preparing to speak. The hashtag #opennetedge is visible in the bottom left corner, suggesting an active social media component for the event. The overall setting indicates a professional and technical discussion aimed at exploring the intersection of government initiatives and open-source technology in the context of 5G networking.
